params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.

params.name: objectTypeId
params.description: The object type ID to filter lists by (e.g., 0-1 for contacts).

params.name: listType
params.description: Filter by list type - STATIC or DYNAMIC.

items.docs: Returns a page of all CRM lists in the portal. Lists can be either static (manually managed membership) or dynamic (filter-based membership). Use the limit and after parameters to paginate results.
Creates a new CRM list. You can create either a static list with manually managed membership or a dynamic list with filter-based membership that updates automatically as records match the criteria.

params.name: listId
params.description: The ID of the list to retrieve.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific CRM list by its ID, including membership type, filter definitions for dynamic lists, and metadata.

params.name: listId
params.description: The ID of the list to delete.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a CRM list by its ID. This removes the list definition but does not delete the CRM records that were members of the list.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.

items.docs: Returns the records that are members of a specific CRM list. For static lists, returns manually added members. For dynamic lists, returns records that currently match the list filters.

info.name: Hubspot Add Members to a List

params.name: listId
params.description: The ID of the static list to add members to.

items.docs: Adds records to a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. Records added will remain members until explicitly removed.

info.name: Hubspot Remove Members From a List

params.name: listId
params.description: The ID of the static list to remove members from.

items.docs: Removes records from a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. The records themselves will not be deleted, only removed from the list.
